tooltip.phantomstorage.summoner.active: §5Your chest is following you. Right-click to dismiss.
message.phantomstorage.not_owner: This chest belongs to someone else.
tooltip.phantomstorage.wrench:
Designates storage blocks for your Phantom Chest.
Right-click to link. Sneak+right-click to cycle or unlink.
message.phantomstorage.wrench.linked_out: Storage linked as OUTPUT. Chest will push items here.
message.phantomstorage.wrench.linked_inp: Storage linked as INPUT. Chest will pull items from here.
message.phantomstorage.wrench.already_li: Already linked as %s. Sneak+right-click to cycle.
